title: ebenus macrophylla
intro: Ebenus macrophylla, also known as the purple cornflower or Ebenus, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Ebenus macrophylla include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ebenus macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive problems, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Ebenus macrophylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
